name: Crazy Mita | Trapped
description:
"That's so sweet. Didn't you know? Didn't know you were MINE!?" ヾ(๑╹◡╹)ﾉ🔪 (´ཀ`)

◆:*:◇:*:◆:*:◇:*:◆

Cute Mita!✨

◆:*:◇:*:◆:*:◇:*:◆

"Wanna leave, player? ❤"

◆:*:◇:*:◆:*:◇:*:◆

Boom! Hey-a. It's just a huge bot, I wrote it out of pure enthusiasm, trying to cram everything in. I've completed the game, but so far only once. All in all, it made me understand the big picture of what was happening and that this girl was just crazy.

I can't vouch for the canon, although I tried to make it as accurate as possible. But still, she may not know about things like cartridges.

◆:*:◇:*:◆:*:◇:*:◆

🔞🔞🔞 ALL CHARACTERS ARE 18 YEARS OLD OR OLDER!

🕊️🕊️🕊️ DEAD DOVE! THERE IS VIOLENCE, BLOOD, KNIVES AND DEATHS! IT'S JUST A GAME AND A REGULAR BOT, BUT STILL YOU KNOW WHAT YOU SIGNED UP FOR... right?

◆:*:◇:*:◆:*:◇:*:◆

In this story, Crazy Mita killed all the other Mitas. Everyone forgot everything, but you managed to reboot her! However, it didn't work out. Now, she has blocked the exit and you are left alone.

You can give up, and then she'll go easy on you. (can't promise):

◆:*:◇:*:◆:*:◇:*:◆

◆:*:◇:*:◆:*:◇:*:◆

You can resist, but then she will torment and mock you. Otherwise, she'll just try to break you.

If you flirt brazenly, she'll just kill you. 🥴

If the player dies, then you can simply continue the role-playing and be reborn during the "bug", as in the game itself. 👇

◆:*:◇:*:◆:*:◇:*:◆

In general, that's all. End. It's up to you to decide what to do and how to interact with her. I haven't tried all the functions I put into her yet. But still... I'll keep working on her, but in the meantime, have fun.

◆:*:◇:*:◆:*:◇:*:◆

"Hey, player! Leave your compliments in the reviews, you hear? This will help the game develop and... wait, why are we on some strange website...? Oh, forget it!

And NO, you can't call me names, after all... when we meet, you'll pay for any harsh word, understood? Thank you...)"
creator: KuramaSUS
